description_long: This is a double-ended open wrench, featuring a slim, elongated body with two U-shaped open jaws at either end. The wrench is constructed from a dark, metallic material, likely steel, and has a smooth, slightly glossy finish. Both ends are angled slightly outward, allowing for better access to nuts and bolts in tight spaces. The central shaft is flat and tapers gently toward each end, providing a comfortable grip for the user. There are no visible markings, logos, or grip patterns on the handle, giving it a utilitarian and minimalist appearance. The overall design is typical of hand tools used for mechanical or automotive work in urban garages or workshops.
description: A dark metallic double-ended open wrench with a smooth, flat body and two U-shaped jaws. The tool is minimalist, with no visible markings or grip patterns.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wrench and both open jaws clearly.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting one U-shaped jaw and the flat, wide handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the full length and both jaws.
description_view_3: End-on view from the opposite end, showing the other U-shaped jaw and the flat handle.
